comment: State overlay reason codes - merged with the base pack's reason-codes.json at load (namespace RC-STATE-*; collision with base codes is a load error). ECOA texts are the exact adverse-action notice strings (HR-10).

RC-STATE-TX-50A6-LTV.ecoa_text: Loan-to-value exceeds the 80% limitation for Texas home equity loans

RC-STATE-TX-50A6-FEES.ecoa_text: Fees exceed the 2% limitation applicable to Texas home equity loans

RC-STATE-TX-50A6-SEASONING.ecoa_text: Texas home equity loan seasoning requirements not met; a prior home equity loan closed within the preceding 12 months

RC-STATE-TX-50A6-SUBORDINATE.ecoa_text: Simultaneous subordinate financing is not permitted with a Texas home equity loan

RC-STATE-HIGHCOST.ecoa_text: Loan terms exceed applicable high-cost loan thresholds; this program does not originate high-cost loans

RC-STATE-NTB.ecoa_text: Net tangible benefit to the borrower not demonstrated as required by state law

RC-STATE-DATA-MISSING.ecoa_text: Information required to evaluate state law compliance was not provided
